experiences.job_description: Backend Developer working across Payments (Scheduler) and Forex teams. Developed scalable backend services using Java and Spring Boot for payment scheduling and currency exchange systems. Designed RESTful APIs and SQL data models, and implemented asynchronous processing with Azure messaging to support high-volume financial operations. Led the backend design of a bulk payment approval system, enabling asynchronous approval/rejection of up to 100 payments with aggregated results.

Worked on a system with hundreds of microservices. Designed and developed new features, optimized system performance, and architected solutions. Implemented asynchronous communication system to reduce reliance on traditional API calls. Contributed to comprehensive testing including integration, unit, BDD, and load testing. Collaborated with frontend teams on Angular-based projects.

Contributed to Project 7#, a high-demand system handling over 200 requests per minute. Developed a dynamic, zero-downtime solution using Spring Boot to manage critical business operations. Played a key role in designing the backend architecture and introduced an automation testing culture within the team.

Contributed to a new portal for Mobile Communications Company of Iran (mci.ir). Designed and implemented a secure hiring system resilient to high volumes of malicious traffic. Developed reusable JSP components (Tag Libraries) within the Liferay framework including CAPTCHA, input fields, and form structures.

Developed web applications using Spring Boot. Implemented new features and tools for a CMS including RSS feed and sitemap generators. Contributed to the design and implementation of various authentication mechanisms across three projects.

First professional backend development role. Designed and developed a private patient management portal using Laravel, handling both backend implementation and frontend development with jQuery. Worked within a small team alongside senior developers.
